Everything is running. Here's everything you need to know:

---

**Icons** — All screens already have consistent `arrow-back` icons for navigation. The new admin screens, KYC flow, guarantor manager and payment screen all have proper back arrows. The tab bar uses filled/outline Ionicons pairs (home/wallet/shield-checkmark/ribbon/person-circle) with a blue pill highlight on the active tab.

---

**Running on Android (for students)**

1. Install the free **Expo Go** app from the Google Play Store on any Android phone
2. In the Replit preview, click the **three-dot menu → Open in new tab** to get the full URL (something like `https://xxxx.picard.replit.dev`)
3. Open Expo Go → tap **Enter URL manually** → paste that URL
4. The app loads instantly — no install needed

For a proper installable APK that works without Expo Go, you would need to run `eas build --platform android` using Expo's build service (free tier available at expo.dev).

---

**Creating the Admin account**

Open the Shell tab in Replit and run this command (replace the password and name):

```
node server/scripts/create-admin.js admin@flism.gh Admin1234! "Flism Admin"
```

You'll see confirmation like:
```
✓ Admin user created successfully!
  Email: admin@flism.gh
  Role:  admin
```

To upgrade an **existing** user to admin (e.g. yourself after registering), use the same command with your registered email — it detects the existing account and upgrades it automatically.

---

**Using the Admin Panel**

1. Log into the app with the admin email and password
2. Go to the **Profile tab** — you'll see a dark **"Admin Dashboard"** card with a gold badge at the top of the support section
3. Tap it to enter the admin panel, which has three sections:

| Section | What you can do |
|---|---|
| **Loan Management** | Filter by status, approve pending loans (disburses funds + notifies student), reject with reason |
| **Asset Management** | Review submitted collateral, verify assets (+15 trust pts to student), reject with reason |
| **User Management** | Search all students, see KYC/trust tier status, manually verify any user |

The admin panel is locked — any non-admin user who tries to visit `/admin` directly gets redirected to the student app automatically.
